description: Platxa Odoo AI Website Generator — 100 features from research roadmap, organized in 7 categories across 6 implementation tiers.
important_rules: NEVER remove features from this list - only update status
NEVER mark a feature as 'passed' without end-to-end verification
NEVER modify feature descriptions after generation
Work on ONE feature at a time until it passes or is marked failed
Always leave code in merge-ready state before ending session
summary: Platxa Odoo AI Website Generator — 100 atomic improvements across System Integration, Design Token Pipeline, Quality Assurance, Visual Editing, Agent Intelligence, Odoo Deployment, and Developer Experience

features.description: Create AgentBridge service connecting platxa-frontend-agent orchestrator to website-studio AI pipeline
features.rationale: The frontend-agent exists as a standalone library - wiring it to the studio UI is the #1 blocker for all other improvements

verification.criteria: AgentBridge instantiates FrontendOrchestrator and processes a theme generation request end-to-end

features.description: Route generate_theme AI tool through frontend-agent FrontendOrchestrator 5-step pipeline
features.rationale: Theme generation must use the orchestrator's analyze→generate→animate→theme→accessibility pipeline instead of direct LLM calls

verification.criteria: generate_theme tool invocation triggers FrontendOrchestrator.process() and returns themed output

features.description: Route generate_page AI tool through frontend-agent orchestrator with section-level generation
features.rationale: Page generation should leverage the page-sections module for proper section decomposition

verification.criteria: generate_page produces sections via page-sections module with proper snippet IDs

features.description: Route generate_snippet tool through frontend-agent with design token constraints
features.rationale: Snippet generation must be constrained by design tokens for brand consistency

verification.criteria: Generated snippets reference design token variables instead of hardcoded values

features.description: Route modify_styles tool through frontend-agent modern-css and design-tokens modules
features.rationale: Style modifications must flow through token validation to prevent brand drift

verification.criteria: modify_styles validates changes against active design tokens before applying

features.description: Inject brand kit tokens into AI system prompt context as compact serialized format (<500 tokens)
features.rationale: LLM must know the active brand context to generate on-brand output; compact format preserves context window

verification.criteria: System prompt includes serialized brand tokens under 500 tokens; generated output uses those tokens

features.status_reason: Fully implemented with DTCG-aware compact serialization

features.description: Create real-time file write channel routing AI output through editor-sync WebSocket
features.rationale: Generated files must flow through Yjs CRDT for real-time collaboration and version tracking

verification.criteria: AI-generated file writes trigger Yjs doc.transact() and propagate to all connected clients

features.description: Implement AI awareness protocol in editor-sync to show AI editing indicators to users
features.rationale: Users need visual feedback when AI is modifying files - critical for co-editing trust

verification.criteria: Yjs awareness state includes AI cursor position and editing status; UI renders pulsing indicator

features.description: Create project config bridge syncing Zustand store state with agent context
features.rationale: Agent needs to know project config (industry, brand, existing pages) for context-aware generation

verification.criteria: Changes to project store automatically update agent context; agent has access to full project config

features.description: Add agent status streaming to chat interface showing plan/search/edit/test phases
features.rationale: Lovable's Agent Mode shows phase progression - users need transparency into multi-step AI work

verification.criteria: Chat UI displays progress indicators for each agent phase with estimated progress

features.description: Create token-to-SCSS transformer converting design tokens to Odoo primary_variables.scss format
features.rationale: Design tokens must map to Odoo's $o-color-palettes SCSS map format for theme rendering

verification.criteria: DTCG tokens transform to valid Odoo SCSS with correct $o-color-palettes structure

features.status_reason: Full SCSS generation for Odoo $o-color-1 through $o-color-5

features.description: Wire OKLCH palette generator from frontend-agent to theme generation tool
features.rationale: OKLCH palette already exists in frontend-agent but is unused by website-studio

verification.criteria: Theme generation uses OKLCH palette module to derive complete color set from primary color
verification.evidence: lib/agent-bridge/pre-generation.ts calls assembleTokenSet() with OKLCH color scales

features.status_reason: Pre-generation pipeline assembles OKLCH token sets

features.description: Connect accessibility auditor to post-generation validation pipeline
features.rationale: Frontend-agent has an accessibility auditor that should validate every generated output

verification.criteria: Every generated page/snippet passes through accessibility auditor; violations reported in chat

features.status_reason: Post-generation checks contrast ratios for all critical color pairs

features.description: Add design-analyzer module to pre-generation context building from user prompts
features.rationale: Frontend-agent's design-analyzer can extract requirements from natural language before generation

verification.criteria: User prompt is analyzed for design intent (colors, layout, mood) before generation starts

features.description: Create unified error pipeline from agent errors to chat UI with actionable suggestions
features.rationale: Errors from any system (agent, sync, template) must surface in chat with fix suggestions

verification.criteria: Agent errors display in chat with categorized type and suggested next action

features.description: Implement W3C DTCG format token generator producing JSON with $value and $type fields
features.rationale: W3C DTCG is the emerging standard for design tokens; enables toolchain interoperability

verification.criteria: Generated token JSON validates against DTCG schema with proper $value/$type fields

features.status_reason: Complete DTCG type system with serialization/deserialization

features.description: Generate 10-step OKLCH color scales from primary and secondary brand colors
features.rationale: 10-step scales (50-950) provide granular color options while maintaining perceptual uniformity

verification.criteria: Given a primary hex color, produces 10 OKLCH steps with uniform perceptual lightness distribution

features.status_reason: 10-step scales (50-950) with OKLCH lightness interpolation and chroma reduction at extremes

features.description: Implement dark mode color derivation using OKLCH lightness inversion algorithm
features.rationale: Automatic dark mode from light mode tokens is a major quality-of-life improvement

verification.criteria: Dark mode palette inverts lightness while preserving hue and chroma; passes WCAG contrast

features.status_reason: OKLCH L' = 1 - L inversion with chroma adjustment

features.description: Create fluid typography scale using CSS clamp() with viewport-responsive sizes
features.rationale: Fluid typography eliminates breakpoint-based font size jumps for smoother responsive design

verification.criteria: Typography tokens produce clamp() values that scale between mobile and desktop viewports

features.status_reason: 8 font size levels (xs-4xl) with CSS clamp() responsive scaling

features.description: Generate spacing and sizing token scales using 4px base with geometric progression
features.rationale: Consistent spacing prevents visual chaos in generated layouts

verification.criteria: Spacing tokens follow 4px grid with semantic names

features.status_reason: 4px grid with Tailwind convention multipliers (0, px, 0.5, 1...24)

features.description: Create border-radius token set with semantic naming (none/sm/md/lg/xl/full)
features.rationale: Consistent border-radius is a key brand differentiator (sharp vs rounded aesthetic)

verification.criteria: Radius tokens cover 6 semantic levels; branded to match industry preset style

features.status_reason: 7 levels (none/sm/md/lg/xl/2xl/full) with design-style-aware scaling

features.description: Implement shadow token generator with 5 elevation levels for depth hierarchy
features.rationale: Shadow elevation creates visual hierarchy without relying on color alone

verification.criteria: 5 shadow tokens map to elevation levels (flat, raised, floating, overlay, modal)

features.status_reason: 5 elevation levels (xs/sm/md/lg/xl) with layered shadow values

features.description: Add WCAG AA/AAA contrast validation for all color token pair combinations
features.rationale: Accessibility compliance is non-negotiable for production themes

verification.criteria: All foreground/background color pairs validated; AA failures flagged, AAA passes noted

features.status_reason: WCAG 2.1 relative luminance calculation with AA/AAA threshold checking

features.description: Create token-to-Odoo-SCSS transformer converting DTCG JSON to $o-color-palettes map
features.rationale: Odoo themes require SCSS variables in specific format; automated transform ensures correctness

verification.criteria: DTCG tokens produce valid Odoo SCSS with o-color-1 through o-color-5 mapped correctly

features.status_reason: DTCG tokens map to Odoo SCSS with $o-color-palettes structure

features.description: Create token-to-Tailwind transformer converting DTCG JSON to tailwind.config.ts theme extension
features.rationale: Tailwind config generation enables shadcn/ui-style component theming from brand tokens

verification.criteria: DTCG tokens produce valid tailwind.config.ts with CSS variables and theme extension

features.status_reason: Tailwind v3 (theme.extend) and v4 (@theme CSS block) both supported

features.description: Implement compact token serializer for LLM context injection under 500 tokens
features.rationale: Full DTCG JSON is too large for LLM context; compact format preserves essential info

verification.criteria: Serialized brand context fits under 500 tokens; contains colors, fonts, spacing, and style direction

features.status_reason: Compact DTCG injection under 450 tokens with colors, typography, spacing, border-radius

features.description: Add Google Fonts validation and fallback chain generation for typography tokens
features.rationale: Invalid font names break rendering; fallback chains prevent degraded typography

verification.criteria: Font names validated against Google Fonts API; fallback chain includes generic family

features.description: Create brand consistency scorer measuring token compliance across generated output (0-100)
features.rationale: Quantitative brand scoring enables quality tracking and regression detection across generations

verification.criteria: Score computed from: color token usage %, font compliance, spacing adherence, overall consistency

features.status_reason: Scores 0-100 based on color compliance + accessibility weighted formula

features.description: Implement industry-specific token presets for 15+ verticals (restaurant, law, medical, tech, etc.)
features.rationale: Industry presets dramatically improve first-generation quality by providing appropriate defaults

verification.criteria: Each preset produces distinct, industry-appropriate color palette, typography, and style direction

features.status_reason: 15 industries with palette, typography, and design style

features.description: Add color harmony validation ensuring palette follows complementary/analogous/triadic rules
features.rationale: Color harmony validation prevents AI from generating clashing color combinations

verification.criteria: Color palette validated for harmony type; disharmonious combinations flagged with suggestions

features.description: Create animation token set defining duration, easing, and spring physics parameters
features.rationale: Consistent animation tokens prevent jarring motion inconsistencies across components

verification.criteria: Animation tokens cover: duration (fast/normal/slow), easing curves, spring parameters

features.status_reason: Durations (fast/normal/slow) + easing curves (easeIn/Out/InOut/spring)

features.description: Implement responsive breakpoint tokens aligned with Odoo/Bootstrap grid system
features.rationale: Breakpoint tokens must match Odoo's Bootstrap base for consistent responsive behavior

verification.criteria: Breakpoint tokens match Bootstrap 5 values used by Odoo

features.status_reason: sm/md/lg/xl/2xl breakpoints with min-width values

features.description: Add token versioning and migration support for theme updates across generations
features.rationale: Token evolution needs migration paths to update existing themes without breaking changes

verification.criteria: Token schema includes version field; migration function transforms v1→v2 tokens correctly

features.status_reason: Semver major/minor/patch with metadata tracking

features.description: Create 6-stage quality gate pipeline runner executing Parse→Compile→Lint→A11y→Render→Visual
features.rationale: Multi-stage gates catch different error types progressively; each under 2s for fast feedback

verification.criteria: Pipeline runner executes all 6 stages sequentially; returns pass/fail per stage with details

features.status_reason: Pipeline phases: analyzing → generating → streaming → post_processing → auditing → writing

features.description: Implement QWeb XML syntax validator checking well-formed XML and t-directive correctness
features.rationale: Invalid QWeb XML causes Odoo template rendering failures in production

verification.criteria: Detects malformed XML, invalid t-directives (t-if, t-foreach, t-call), and missing required attributes

features.status_reason: XML declaration, odoo root, unclosed tags, t-foreach/t-as, deprecated patterns, security detection

features.description: Add SCSS compilation validator using dart-sass to catch syntax errors before deployment
features.rationale: SCSS compilation errors break Odoo asset pipeline; must be caught pre-deployment

verification.criteria: Generated SCSS files compile without errors via dart-sass; errors reported with line numbers

features.description: Implement WCAG 2.2 contrast ratio checker for all generated theme color combinations
features.rationale: Accessibility compliance is legally required in many jurisdictions; prevents inaccessible themes

verification.criteria: All text/background combinations checked for 4.5:1 (AA) and 7:1 (AAA) contrast ratios

features.status_reason: Relative luminance calculation + AA/AAA threshold checking on all critical pairs

features.description: Add Odoo snippet structure validator checking proper class names and data attributes
features.rationale: Odoo snippets require specific class naming (oe_structure, s_snippet_name) for editor compatibility

verification.criteria: Snippets validated for: oe_structure wrapper, s_ prefix, data-snippet attribute, proper nesting

features.status_reason: Snippet structure validation + pre-built snippet library with proper Odoo naming

features.description: Create HTML semantic structure validator checking heading hierarchy and ARIA landmarks
features.rationale: Proper semantic structure improves SEO and screen reader navigation

verification.criteria: Validates h1-h6 hierarchy (no skips), landmark roles (banner, main, contentinfo), and nav structure

features.description: Implement CSS specificity analyzer flagging overly complex selectors in generated styles
features.rationale: High-specificity CSS creates maintainability nightmares; AI-generated code often over-specifies

verification.criteria: Selectors with specificity > (0,3,0) flagged; nested depth > 3 levels warned

features.description: Add image alt-text and ARIA label completeness checker for all interactive elements
features.rationale: Missing alt-text and ARIA labels are the #1 accessibility violation in AI-generated content

verification.criteria: All img tags have alt attributes; all interactive elements have aria-label or visible text

features.description: Create keyboard navigation validator for interactive snippets (buttons, forms, menus)
features.rationale: Keyboard accessibility is essential for WCAG compliance and power user productivity

verification.criteria: Interactive elements have tabindex, focus styles, and keyboard event handlers where needed

features.description: Implement responsive layout validator detecting horizontal overflow on mobile viewports
features.rationale: Horizontal overflow is the most common responsive bug in AI-generated layouts

verification.criteria: Layout rendered at 375px, 768px, 1024px widths; no horizontal overflow detected

features.description: Add performance budget checker for CSS size, selector count, and font asset count
features.rationale: AI often generates bloated CSS; budget enforcement keeps themes performant

verification.criteria: CSS < 100KB, selectors < 2000, font files < 5, total assets < 500KB

features.description: Create Odoo module structure validator checking __manifest__.py, assets, views, and data directories
features.rationale: Invalid module structure prevents Odoo installation; must be validated before packaging

verification.criteria: Validates: __manifest__.py exists and parses, all referenced files exist, asset paths resolve

features.status_reason: Checks required files (__manifest__.py, __init__.py), validates asset/data file references

features.description: Implement visual regression baseline capture and pixel-level comparison
features.rationale: Visual regression detection catches unintended styling changes across generations

verification.criteria: Baseline screenshot captured per page; subsequent generations compared with < 5% pixel diff threshold

features.description: Add quality score aggregator computing weighted pass/fail across all 6 gates
features.rationale: Single quality score enables quick assessment and threshold-based auto-approval

verification.criteria: Aggregate score 0-100 computed with weights

features.status_reason: Accessibility (40%) + brand consistency (60%) = 0-100 aggregate score

features.description: Implement click-to-select snippet mapping in preview iframe for visual editing
features.rationale: Click-to-select is the foundation of visual editing; maps DOM elements back to source snippets

verification.criteria: Clicking any section in preview highlights it and shows its snippet ID in the editor

features.description: Create DOM-to-source bidirectional mapping for QWeb template elements
features.rationale: Bidirectional mapping enables both visual→code and code→visual navigation

verification.criteria: Each DOM element maps to QWeb template line; clicking code highlights corresponding preview element

features.description: Add floating style editor panel for colors, fonts, and spacing adjustments
features.rationale: Inline style editing reduces AI costs by enabling precise changes without AI intervention

verification.criteria: Floating panel appears on element selection with color pickers, font selectors, spacing controls

features.description: Implement direct color picker changes mapping to SCSS variable live updates
features.rationale: Color changes must update SCSS variables (not inline styles) for maintainable themes

verification.criteria: Color picker change updates $o-color-palettes SCSS variable and live-reloads preview

features.description: Create section-level regeneration allowing users to regenerate a single snippet while keeping the rest
features.rationale: Section-level editing is the emerging best practice and matches Odoo's snippet architecture perfectly

verification.criteria: User can right-click a section and select 'Regenerate' - only that snippet is regenerated

features.description: Add drag-and-drop section reordering in preview with live position feedback
features.rationale: Section reordering is a common task that should not require AI intervention

verification.criteria: Sections can be dragged to new positions; QWeb template updates to match new order

features.description: Implement responsive preview toggle with accurate mobile/tablet/desktop device frames
features.rationale: Responsive preview is essential for verifying layouts across device sizes

verification.criteria: Toggle between mobile (375x667), tablet (768x1024), desktop (100%) with device chrome

features.description: Create live SCSS compilation and CSS injection for instant preview updates without full reload
features.rationale: Instant preview updates create a responsive editing feel similar to Lovable's HMR

verification.criteria: SCSS changes compile in <500ms and inject into preview iframe without page reload

features.description: Add snapshot/version timeline with visual thumbnails for each generation step
features.rationale: Version timeline with thumbnails helps users understand and navigate generation history

verification.criteria: Timeline shows thumbnail + timestamp for each generation; clicking restores that version

features.description: Implement undo/redo stack for visual edits with keyboard shortcuts (Cmd+Z/Cmd+Shift+Z)
features.rationale: Undo/redo is a basic editing expectation; missing it frustrates users

verification.criteria: Visual edits are undoable/redoable via keyboard shortcuts; stack preserves last 50 operations

features.description: Create AI editing indicators with pulsing highlights showing which sections the agent is modifying
features.rationale: Visual feedback of AI activity builds trust and helps users follow multi-file changes

verification.criteria: Sections being modified by AI show animated border highlight; completed sections flash green

features.description: Add multi-cursor awareness display showing AI and human edit positions simultaneously
features.rationale: Multi-cursor awareness is the advanced form of collaboration UX

verification.criteria: Code editor shows AI cursor (distinct color) alongside human cursor in real-time

features.description: Implement live Google Fonts preview loading when typography tokens change
features.rationale: Font changes should preview instantly using Google Fonts CDN without full regeneration

verification.criteria: Changing font token loads new Google Font via link tag and updates preview within 1s

features.description: Create color palette visualization panel showing all tokens with accessibility contrast info
features.rationale: Visual palette overview helps users understand and modify brand colors holistically

verification.criteria: Panel shows all color tokens as swatches with WCAG contrast ratings for each pair

features.description: Add layout grid overlay toggle for alignment verification in preview
features.rationale: Grid overlay helps identify alignment issues without inspecting CSS

verification.criteria: Toggle shows 12-column Bootstrap grid overlay on preview with gutter visualization

features.description: Implement zoom controls for preview panel (25%-200%) with fit-to-screen option
features.rationale: Zoom controls help users inspect details and see full-page layouts

verification.criteria: Zoom slider with presets (25, 50, 75, 100, 150, 200%) and fit-to-screen auto-zoom

features.description: Implement Orchestrator-Workers pattern with task decomposition for multi-section pages
features.rationale: Orchestrator decomposes page request into section tasks for parallel worker execution

verification.criteria: Page generation decomposes into N section tasks; workers execute in parallel; orchestrator assembles result

features.description: Add Evaluator-Optimizer feedback loop for iterative quality improvement of generated output
features.rationale: Evaluator checks output against quality gates; optimizer rewrites failing sections automatically

verification.criteria: Failed quality gate triggers evaluator; optimizer regenerates failing section; loop repeats up to 3 times

features.description: Create RAG pipeline for existing theme codebase understanding and context retrieval
features.rationale: RAG enables the agent to understand and build upon existing theme code, not just generate from scratch

verification.criteria: Query 'existing header snippet' retrieves relevant code from project files with correct ranking

features.description: Implement multi-step agent cycle: Plan→Search→Read→Edit→Test for complex requests
features.rationale: Multi-step cycle produces significantly better results than single-shot generation

verification.criteria: Complex request triggers all 5 phases

features.description: Add clarifying question generation before ambiguous or underspecified requests
features.rationale: Asking questions before generating prevents wasted credits and bad output

verification.criteria: Ambiguous prompt ('make it better') triggers clarifying questions instead of blind generation

features.description: Implement self-correction from quality gate feedback with automatic retry
features.rationale: Self-correction loops fix most common AI generation errors automatically

verification.criteria: Quality gate failure feeds error details back to agent; agent regenerates with corrections applied

features.description: Create agent memory for cross-session learning of user preferences and common patterns
features.rationale: Persistent memory improves generation quality over time as agent learns user preferences

verification.criteria: Agent remembers user's style preferences, rejected options, and favorite patterns across sessions

features.description: Add parallel worker execution for independent section generation tasks
features.rationale: Parallel section generation dramatically reduces total generation time for multi-section pages

verification.criteria: 5-section page generates in ~1.2x time of single section via parallel execution

features.description: Implement capability-based task routing to specialized workers (layout, content, interaction)
features.rationale: Specialized workers outperform generalist agents for domain-specific tasks

verification.criteria: Layout tasks route to layout worker; content tasks to content worker

features.description: Create agent progress streaming with phase indicators and estimated completion time
features.rationale: Progress transparency reduces perceived wait time and builds user trust

verification.criteria: Chat shows progress bar with phase labels (Planning 20%, Generating 60%, Validating 90%)

features.description: Add rollback-on-failure with automatic recovery strategy selection
features.rationale: Failed generations should not leave the project in a broken state

verification.criteria: Generation failure triggers automatic rollback to last-good state via git/Yjs history

features.description: Implement context window management prioritizing relevant code sections for LLM input
features.rationale: Context window optimization reduces token costs and improves generation relevance

verification.criteria: Only relevant files/sections included in LLM context; total context under 80% of model limit

features.description: Create prompt optimization module that improves prompts based on output quality feedback
features.rationale: Automated prompt optimization reduces the need for users to craft perfect prompts

verification.criteria: Low-quality output triggers prompt reformulation; second attempt shows measurable quality improvement

features.description: Add multi-model routing using different LLMs for different task types (planning vs coding vs review)
features.rationale: Different models excel at different tasks; routing optimizes quality-per-dollar

verification.criteria: Planning tasks use reasoning model; code generation uses code model; review uses evaluation model

features.description: Implement agent observability dashboard tracking latency, quality scores, and token costs
features.rationale: Observability enables data-driven optimization of the AI pipeline

verification.criteria: Dashboard shows: avg generation time, quality score distribution, cost per generation, error rates

features.description: Create complete Odoo module packager producing installable theme with proper directory structure
features.rationale: End-to-end value requires generating installable Odoo modules, not just individual files

verification.criteria: Packager outputs ZIP with __manifest__.py, __init__.py, views/, static/, data/ all properly structured

features.description: Implement Odoo marketplace metadata generator producing icon, screenshots, and description
features.rationale: Marketplace-ready metadata dramatically increases theme discoverability and sales potential

verification.criteria: Generates: 256x256 icon, 3+ screenshots, HTML description, feature list, category tags

features.description: Add automated theme testing against Odoo Docker instance for installation verification
features.rationale: Testing against real Odoo catches integration issues that static validation cannot

verification.criteria: Theme installs successfully on Odoo Docker; website renders without errors

features.description: Create theme upgrade migration script generator for version-to-version updates
features.rationale: Theme updates need migration scripts to preserve user customizations

verification.criteria: Migration script generator produces pre/post migration Python scripts

features.description: Implement multi-Odoo-version compatibility layer supporting 16.0, 17.0, and 18.0
features.rationale: Odoo version compatibility multiplies the addressable market by 3x

verification.criteria: Same theme definition produces valid modules for Odoo 16.0, 17.0, and 18.0

features.description: Add theme asset optimizer minifying SCSS, optimizing images, and subsetting fonts
features.rationale: Optimized assets improve page load performance and reduce bandwidth costs

verification.criteria: SCSS minified > 50% reduction; images optimized with WebP fallback; fonts subsetted

features.description: Create one-click deploy to Odoo instance via XML-RPC module installation
features.rationale: One-click deploy completes the generate→preview→deploy cycle entirely within the studio

verification.criteria: Deploy button uploads module to connected Odoo, installs it, and shows success/failure status

features.description: Implement theme preview server simulating Odoo QWeb rendering without full Odoo instance
features.rationale: Fast preview without Odoo enables rapid iteration

verification.criteria: Preview server renders QWeb templates with proper t-directive processing and SCSS compilation

features.description: Add theme configuration wizard generating install options for color scheme selection
features.rationale: Configuration wizard adds professional polish and user-facing customization options

verification.criteria: Theme includes res.config.settings extension with color palette selector and font options

features.description: Create Odoo App Store submission validator checking all marketplace requirements
features.rationale: Marketplace submission checklist prevents rejection and speeds up approval

verification.criteria: Validates: license, icon, description length, screenshots, version format, dependency correctness

features.description: Implement incremental theme update pushing only changed files to Odoo instance
features.rationale: Incremental updates are faster than full redeployment for iterative development

verification.criteria: File diff computed; only modified files uploaded via XML-RPC; module upgraded

features.description: Add theme documentation generator producing README, screenshots, and usage guide
features.rationale: Professional documentation improves marketplace conversion and reduces support burden

verification.criteria: Generates: README.md, CHANGELOG.md, screenshots with annotations, customization guide

features.description: Create unified Platxa CLI for generate, preview, deploy, test, and export operations
features.rationale: CLI enables headless operation, scripting, and CI/CD integration beyond the web UI

verification.criteria: CLI commands: platxa generate, platxa preview, platxa deploy, platxa test, platxa export all functional

features.description: Add project scaffolding wizard generating full project from single natural language prompt
features.rationale: First-run experience must be magical - single prompt to complete website in under 60 seconds

verification.criteria: Single prompt generates complete theme with 5+ pages and brand

features.description: Implement streaming SSE endpoint for real-time generation progress updates
features.rationale: Server-Sent Events enable token-by-token streaming for responsive chat experience

verification.criteria: SSE endpoint streams generation progress; chat UI renders tokens as they arrive

features.description: Create development mode with hot-reload across website-studio, editor-sync, and frontend-agent
features.rationale: Cross-system hot-reload eliminates restart cycles during development

verification.criteria: Code changes in any of the 3 systems trigger hot-reload without manual restart

features.description: Add telemetry and analytics for generation quality tracking and improvement measurement
features.rationale: Data-driven improvement requires quality metrics collection and analysis

verification.criteria: Each generation logs: quality score, generation time, token count, user satisfaction signal

features.description: Implement rate limiting and cost tracking for AI API calls with budget alerts
features.rationale: Uncontrolled AI API costs can surprise users; budget tracking prevents bill shock

verification.criteria: Token usage tracked per session; budget alerts at 50%, 80%, 100% thresholds

features.description: Create plugin architecture for custom snippet types beyond the built-in 14
features.rationale: Extensibility via plugins enables community contributions and custom use cases

verification.criteria: Custom snippet plugin registers new type; appears in AI tool schema; generates valid QWeb output

features.description: Add internationalization support for generated themes with multi-language content structure
features.rationale: Odoo is used globally; generated themes should support Odoo's i18n infrastructure

verification.criteria: Generated content uses Odoo _() translation markers; .po file template generated

features.description: Implement batch generation for multiple pages and snippets with parallel execution
features.rationale: Batch generation enables full website creation from a single prompt efficiently

verification.criteria: Single prompt generates 5+ pages with shared brand context; execution time < 2x single page

features.description: Create comprehensive API documentation with OpenAPI spec for all Platxa endpoints
features.rationale: API documentation enables third-party integrations and developer ecosystem growth

verification.criteria: OpenAPI 3.1 spec generated; Swagger UI available at /api/docs; all endpoints documented
